target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building shows extensive structural collapse with roof and upper floors missing; visible fire and smoke; debris field at base; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% damage, showing extensive structural collapse, missing roof and upper floors, visible fire and smoke, and a debris field. The overall scene depicts a multi-story building heavily damaged by fire and collapse, with smoke rising and scattered debris across the foreground. The likely functional impact is complete loss of the building’s structural integrity and operational capacity.
